_comment5: This tag defines blocks explicitly FORBIDDEN from switch texture customization.
_comment6: Blocks in this tag are ALWAYS rejected, even if they pass property checks.
_comment7: This tag takes PRIORITY over the whitelist.
_comment12: - Add mod namespaces: All blocks from a mod (if tag exists)
_comment15: Create a datapack with this same file path to block problematic blocks:
_comment30: - Transparent blocks (glass, ice) - causes visual issues
_comment31: - Partial blocks (stairs, slabs, fences) - not full cubes
_comment32: - Complex blocks (spawners, end portals) - technical issues
